c.d: Platforms on which the app is available, e.g., iOS, Android, desktop
Number of podcast titles available in the app’s database
Whether the app is free, freemium, or paid, including subscription fees if any
Simplicity and intuitiveness of navigation and discovery features
Availability of features like voice boost, silence trimming, sleep timer, variable speed playback, Smart Play
Ability to sync podcast progress and subscriptions across multiple devices
Tools offered to discover new and trending podcasts, including curated playlists and exclusive recommendations
Whether the app is open source and community supported
